tui.help_bar: Ctrl+K: Commands | Ctrl+T: Tools | Ctrl+L: Clear | Esc: Back

onboarding.security_warning_body:
Krab is a powerful AI agent framework that can:
  • Execute shell commands
  • Read and write files
  • Search the web
  • Access your system

If you enable tools, a malicious prompt could trick the AI
into performing unsafe actions.

Recommended security practices:
  • Use sandbox mode for untrusted inputs
  • Enable tool approval for destructive actions
  • Never expose sensitive credentials to the agent
  • Use strong API keys and keep them secret
  • Regularly audit with: krab security audit
onboarding.security_confirm: I understand this is powerful and inherently risky. Continue?
